historicalRunExceptions.reason: One completed pre-cap Sol/Ultra evaluation is retained with truthful full-text provenance; the exact run/date exception cannot apply to future runs.

verificationScope: The host runner fixes gpt-5.6-sol with high reasoning, isolates model and publisher worktrees, and mechanically verifies report structure plus the official arXiv announcement date and complete primary-New ID sets. One exact completed 2026-07-14 Sol/Ultra run is grandfathered so its already-incurred full-text work is reported truthfully rather than discarded or mislabeled. Original titles and authors are read from official version-fixed pages under the evaluation contract but are not independently reproduced by the snapshot parser. The host cannot independently attest private service-side reasoning or make a benchmark-equivalence claim.
publicationRule: Publish schema-1.4 editions using Daily arXiv rubric 3.0 whose three reports exactly match a stable host-fetched arXiv snapshot, contain identical run metadata and explicitly verified model selection, complete every score, score reason, audit, and natural-Japanese field, and document full-text review of every final top-ten paper. New daily runs use Sol/High and at most twelve full texts per category; only the exact historical run/date exception listed here may retain its larger already-completed Sol/Ultra review set.
